raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The cancellation of hazard mitigation project applications from Fiscal Years 2020-2023 in the Building Resilient Infrastructure and Communities program will leave Californians vulnerable to disasters.",
    "Napa County will lose up to $35 million in funding for wildfire mitigation projects due to the cancellation.",
    "Mendocino County will lose up to $37.8 million in funding for wildfire mitigation projects due to the cancellation.",
    "Santa Cruz County will lose up to $11.2 million in funding for wildfire mitigation projects due to the cancellation.",
    "The California Earthquake Authority will lose over $40 million allocated for seismic retrofits in urban areas due to the cancellation.",
    "The Paradise Irrigation District is set to lose up to $37.5 million for critical safety improvements to the Magalia Dam due to the cancellation."
  ]
}
```
